rationale.R1.3: The response provides detailed critiques and suggested revisions that align closely with the evidence presented in the artifact.
rationale.RX.1: The response clearly identifies areas of uncertainty and missing information, marking them as such.
rationale.RX.3: The response covers all aspects of the active set without any drift or omission.
rationale.RX.4: The response does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only critiques existing claims and suggests improvements.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the suggested revisions is well-justified with reasoning.
